mapper.select:
SELECT PRDCT_ID, PRDCT_NM, PRVSN_NM1, PRVSN_NM2, PRVSN_NM3, PRVSN_NM4, PRVSN_NM5 FROM ( SELECT PRDCT_ID, PRDCT_NM, PRVSN_NM1, PRVSN_NM2, PRVSN_NM3, PRVSN_NM4, ( SELECT C.AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM FROM PRDCT_PRVSN_UPDATE_MGT C WHERE ALLTB.PRVSN_ID5 = C.PRVSN_ID ORDER BY AMNDMNT_SERNO DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY ) AS PRVSN_NM5 FROM ( SELECT A.PRDCT_ID, B.PRDCT_NM, (SELECT C.AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM FROM PRDCT_PRVSN_UPDATE_MGT C WHERE A.CMMN_PRVSN_ID = C.PRVSN_ID ORDER BY ENFRCMNT_DT DESC, AMNDMNT_SERNO DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY) AS PRVSN_NM1, (SELECT C.AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM FROM PRDCT_PRVSN_UPDATE_MGT C WHERE A.CTGRY_CMMN_PRVSN_ID = C.PRVSN_ID ORDER BY ENFRCMNT_DT DESC, AMNDMNT_SERNO DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY) AS PRVSN_NM2, (SELECT C.AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM FROM PRDCT_PRVSN_UPDATE_MGT C WHERE A.PRDCT_PRVSN_ID = C.PRVSN_ID ORDER BY ENFRCMNT_DT DESC, AMNDMNT_SERNO DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY) AS PRVSN_NM3, (SELECT C.AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM FROM PRDCT_PRVSN_UPDATE_MGT C WHERE A.PRDCT_EXPLN_DOC_ID = C.PRVSN_ID ORDER BY ENFRCMNT_DT DESC, AMNDMNT_SERNO DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY) AS PRVSN_NM4, (SELECT F.PRVSN_ID FROM PRDCT_PRVSN_MGT F INNER JOIN BANNR_DTL_INFO G ON TO_CHAR(F.PRVSN_ID) = TO_CHAR(G.IMG_NM) WHERE TO_CHAR(G.EXPS_ODR) = TO_CHAR(A.PRDCT_ID) AND G.BANNR_ID='0' AND G.LNK_URL='PRDCT_EXPLN_DOC_ID_NEW' ORDER BY G.REGIST_TMP DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY) AS PRVSN_ID5 FROM PRDCT_DISCLOSURE_MGT A , FNANCL_PRDCT_CMMN B WHERE A.PRDCT_ID = B.PRDCT_ID
AND A.PRDCT_ID = (SELECT PRDCT_ID FROM MA30_FNANCL_PRDCT_DPST WHERE PRDCT_CD = #{prdctCd} FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY)
AND A.PRDCT_ID = (SELECT PRDCT_ID FROM MA30_FNANCL_PRDCT_LOAN WHERE PRDCT_CD = #{prdctCd} FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY)
AND A.PRDCT_ID = (SELECT PRDCT_ID FROM MA30_FNANCL_PRDCT_TRUST WHERE PRDCT_CD = #{prdctCd} FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY)
AND A.PRDCT_ID = (SELECT PRDCT_ID FROM MA30_FNANCL_PRDCT_CARD WHERE PRDCT_CD = #{prdctCd} FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY)
AND A.PRDCT_ID = (SELECT PRDCT_ID FROM MA30_FNANCL_PRDCT_INSRNC WHERE PRDCT_CD = #{prdctCd} FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY)
AND A.PRDCT_ID = #{prdctId}
) AS ALLTB ) AS RETB FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY WITH UR

SELECT PRDCT_ID, PRDCT_NM, PRVSN_NM1, PRVSN_NM2, PRVSN_NM3, PRVSN_NM4, PRVSN_NM5, PRVSN_NM6, PRVSN_NM7, PRVSN_NM8, PRVSN_NM9, PRVSN_NM10, PRVSN_NM11, PRVSN_NM12, PRVSN_NM13, PRVSN_NM14, PRVSN_NM15 FROM ( SELECT PRDCT_ID, PRDCT_NM, PRVSN_NM1, PRVSN_NM2, PRVSN_NM3, PRVSN_NM4, (SELECT C.AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM FROM PRDCT_PRVSN_UPDATE_MGT C WHERE ALLTB.PRVSN_ID5 = C.PRVSN_ID AND C.ENFRCMNT_DT <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ORDER BY AMNDMNT_SERNO DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY) AS PRVSN_NM5, (SELECT C.AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM FROM PRDCT_PRVSN_UPDATE_MGT C WHERE ALLTB.PRVSN_ID6 = C.PRVSN_ID AND C.ENFRCMNT_DT <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ORDER BY AMNDMNT_SERNO DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY) AS PRVSN_NM6, (SELECT C.AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM FROM PRDCT_PRVSN_UPDATE_MGT C WHERE ALLTB.PRVSN_ID7 = C.PRVSN_ID AND C.ENFRCMNT_DT <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ORDER BY AMNDMNT_SERNO DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY) AS PRVSN_NM7, (SELECT C.AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM FROM PRDCT_PRVSN_UPDATE_MGT C WHERE ALLTB.PRVSN_ID8 = C.PRVSN_ID AND C.ENFRCMNT_DT <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ORDER BY AMNDMNT_SERNO DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY) AS PRVSN_NM8, (SELECT C.AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM FROM PRDCT_PRVSN_UPDATE_MGT C WHERE ALLTB.PRVSN_ID9 = C.PRVSN_ID AND C.ENFRCMNT_DT <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ORDER BY AMNDMNT_SERNO DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY) AS PRVSN_NM9, (SELECT C.AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM FROM PRDCT_PRVSN_UPDATE_MGT C WHERE ALLTB.PRVSN_ID10 = C.PRVSN_ID AND C.ENFRCMNT_DT <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ORDER BY AMNDMNT_SERNO DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY) AS PRVSN_NM10, (SELECT C.AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM FROM PRDCT_PRVSN_UPDATE_MGT C WHERE ALLTB.PRVSN_ID11 = C.PRVSN_ID AND C.ENFRCMNT_DT <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ORDER BY AMNDMNT_SERNO DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY) AS PRVSN_NM11, (SELECT C.AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM FROM PRDCT_PRVSN_UPDATE_MGT C WHERE ALLTB.PRVSN_ID12 = C.PRVSN_ID AND C.ENFRCMNT_DT <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ORDER BY AMNDMNT_SERNO DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY) AS PRVSN_NM12, (SELECT C.AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM FROM PRDCT_PRVSN_UPDATE_MGT C WHERE ALLTB.PRVSN_ID13 = C.PRVSN_ID AND C.ENFRCMNT_DT <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ORDER BY AMNDMNT_SERNO DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY) AS PRVSN_NM13, (SELECT C.AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM FROM PRDCT_PRVSN_UPDATE_MGT C WHERE ALLTB.PRVSN_ID14 = C.PRVSN_ID AND C.ENFRCMNT_DT <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ORDER BY AMNDMNT_SERNO DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY) AS PRVSN_NM14, (SELECT C.AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM FROM PRDCT_PRVSN_UPDATE_MGT C WHERE ALLTB.PRVSN_ID15 = C.PRVSN_ID AND C.ENFRCMNT_DT <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ORDER BY AMNDMNT_SERNO DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY) AS PRVSN_NM15 FROM ( SELECT A.PRDCT_ID, B.PRDCT_NM, (SELECT C.AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM FROM PRDCT_PRVSN_UPDATE_MGT C WHERE A.CMMN_PRVSN_ID = C.PRVSN_ID AND C.ENFRCMNT_DT <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ORDER BY ENFRCMNT_DT DESC, AMNDMNT_SERNO DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY) AS PRVSN_NM1, (SELECT C.AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM FROM PRDCT_PRVSN_UPDATE_MGT C WHERE A.CTGRY_CMMN_PRVSN_ID = C.PRVSN_ID AND C.ENFRCMNT_DT <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ORDER BY ENFRCMNT_DT DESC, AMNDMNT_SERNO DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY) AS PRVSN_NM2, (SELECT C.AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM FROM PRDCT_PRVSN_UPDATE_MGT C WHERE A.PRDCT_PRVSN_ID = C.PRVSN_ID AND C.ENFRCMNT_DT <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ORDER BY ENFRCMNT_DT DESC, AMNDMNT_SERNO DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY) AS PRVSN_NM3, (SELECT C.AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM FROM PRDCT_PRVSN_UPDATE_MGT C WHERE A.PRDCT_EXPLN_DOC_ID = C.PRVSN_ID AND C.ENFRCMNT_DT <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ORDER BY ENFRCMNT_DT DESC, AMNDMNT_SERNO DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY) AS PRVSN_NM4, (SELECT F.PRVSN_ID FROM PRDCT_PRVSN_MGT F INNER JOIN PRDCT_DOC_LIST G ON TO_CHAR(F.PRVSN_ID) = TO_CHAR(G.PRVSN_ID) WHERE TO_CHAR(G.PRDCT_ID) = TO_CHAR(A.PRDCT_ID) AND G.PRVSN_MK='0' ORDER BY G.REGIST_DT DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY) AS PRVSN_ID5, (SELECT F.PRVSN_ID FROM PRDCT_PRVSN_MGT F INNER JOIN PRDCT_DOC_LIST G ON TO_CHAR(F.PRVSN_ID) = TO_CHAR(G.PRVSN_ID) WHERE TO_CHAR(G.PRDCT_ID) = TO_CHAR(A.PRDCT_ID) AND G.PRVSN_MK='1' ORDER BY G.REGIST_DT DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY) AS PRVSN_ID6, (SELECT F.PRVSN_ID FROM PRDCT_PRVSN_MGT F INNER JOIN PRDCT_DOC_LIST G ON TO_CHAR(F.PRVSN_ID) = TO_CHAR(G.PRVSN_ID) WHERE TO_CHAR(G.PRDCT_ID) = TO_CHAR(A.PRDCT_ID) AND G.PRVSN_MK='2' ORDER BY G.REGIST_DT DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY) AS PRVSN_ID7, (SELECT F.PRVSN_ID FROM PRDCT_PRVSN_MGT F INNER JOIN PRDCT_DOC_LIST G ON TO_CHAR(F.PRVSN_ID) = TO_CHAR(G.PRVSN_ID) WHERE TO_CHAR(G.PRDCT_ID) = TO_CHAR(A.PRDCT_ID) AND G.PRVSN_MK='3' ORDER BY G.REGIST_DT DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY) AS PRVSN_ID8, (SELECT F.PRVSN_ID FROM PRDCT_PRVSN_MGT F INNER JOIN PRDCT_DOC_LIST G ON TO_CHAR(F.PRVSN_ID) = TO_CHAR(G.PRVSN_ID) WHERE TO_CHAR(G.PRDCT_ID) = TO_CHAR(A.PRDCT_ID) AND G.PRVSN_MK='4' ORDER BY G.REGIST_DT DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY) AS PRVSN_ID9, (SELECT F.PRVSN_ID FROM PRDCT_PRVSN_MGT F INNER JOIN PRDCT_DOC_LIST G ON TO_CHAR(F.PRVSN_ID) = TO_CHAR(G.PRVSN_ID) WHERE TO_CHAR(G.PRDCT_ID) = TO_CHAR(A.PRDCT_ID) AND G.PRVSN_MK='5' ORDER BY G.REGIST_DT DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY) AS PRVSN_ID10, (SELECT F.PRVSN_ID FROM PRDCT_PRVSN_MGT F INNER JOIN PRDCT_DOC_LIST G ON TO_CHAR(F.PRVSN_ID) = TO_CHAR(G.PRVSN_ID) WHERE TO_CHAR(G.PRDCT_ID) = TO_CHAR(A.PRDCT_ID) AND G.PRVSN_MK='6' ORDER BY G.REGIST_DT DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY) AS PRVSN_ID11, (SELECT F.PRVSN_ID FROM PRDCT_PRVSN_MGT F INNER JOIN PRDCT_DOC_LIST G ON TO_CHAR(F.PRVSN_ID) = TO_CHAR(G.PRVSN_ID) WHERE TO_CHAR(G.PRDCT_ID) = TO_CHAR(A.PRDCT_ID) AND G.PRVSN_MK='7' ORDER BY G.REGIST_DT DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY) AS PRVSN_ID12, (SELECT F.PRVSN_ID FROM PRDCT_PRVSN_MGT F INNER JOIN PRDCT_DOC_LIST G ON TO_CHAR(F.PRVSN_ID) = TO_CHAR(G.PRVSN_ID) WHERE TO_CHAR(G.PRDCT_ID) = TO_CHAR(A.PRDCT_ID) AND G.PRVSN_MK='8' ORDER BY G.REGIST_DT DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY) AS PRVSN_ID13, (SELECT F.PRVSN_ID FROM PRDCT_PRVSN_MGT F INNER JOIN PRDCT_DOC_LIST G ON TO_CHAR(F.PRVSN_ID) = TO_CHAR(G.PRVSN_ID) WHERE TO_CHAR(G.PRDCT_ID) = TO_CHAR(A.PRDCT_ID) AND G.PRVSN_MK='9' ORDER BY G.REGIST_DT DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY) AS PRVSN_ID14, (SELECT F.PRVSN_ID FROM PRDCT_PRVSN_MGT F INNER JOIN BANNR_DTL_INFO G ON TO_CHAR(F.PRVSN_ID) = TO_CHAR(G.IMG_NM) WHERE TO_CHAR(G.EXPS_ODR) = TO_CHAR(A.PRDCT_ID) AND G.BANNR_ID='0' AND G.LNK_URL='PRDCT_EXPLN_DOC_ID_NEW' ORDER BY G.REGIST_TMP DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY) AS PRVSN_ID15 FROM PRDCT_DISCLOSURE_MGT A , FNANCL_PRDCT_CMMN B WHERE A.PRDCT_ID = B.PRDCT_ID AND A.PRDCT_ID = #{prdctId} ) AS ALLTB ) AS RETB WITH UR
